name: Viego
playstyleSummary: Viego is a jungler or fighter whose whole identity is possessing the bodies of enemies (and monsters) he's just killed, temporarily gaining their abilities and items. Playing him feels like a chain of opportunities: land a kill, hop into the corpse, use it to fight or reposition, then look for the next takedown. It's a flashy, snowball-heavy playstyle that rewards aggressive, opportunistic play.
strengths: Possessing a dead enemy grants healing and temporary access to their abilities
Blade of the Ruined King deals strong percent-health damage in extended fights
Harrowed Path gives camouflage and mobility for repositioning or ganking
Heartbreaker can execute a priority target from range and disrupt their allies
weaknesses: Loses most of his power if he can't get takedowns to possess bodies
Spectral Maw's dash telegraphs his engage, giving enemies time to react
Falls off if the game stalls without kills to chain off of
Vulnerable during the wind-up on his dash before it fires

abilities.name: Sovereign's Domination
abilities.howToUseIt: When an enemy dies near you, they leave a wraith; attacking it lets you possess their body, healing you and temporarily granting their abilities plus a free cast of your own ultimate. Always look to possess a wraith after a kill instead of walking away, since it refreshes your resources and options.

abilities.name: Blade of the Ruined King
abilities.howToUseIt: This passively deals bonus damage based on current health on your attacks and steals health when it strikes twice against a recently-hit enemy. Activate it to thrust forward and hit multiple enemies in a line, especially useful for poking or finishing a fight.

abilities.name: Spectral Maw
abilities.howToUseIt: Charge this up before dashing forward to stun the first enemy hit with a ball of mist. Use it to engage a fight or to punish an enemy who's out of position, but be aware the wind-up gives them a chance to react.

abilities.name: Harrowed Path
abilities.howToUseIt: Cast this on terrain to haunt it, then hide inside as a camouflaged wraith with bonus move and attack speed. Use it to scout brush safely, set up an ambush, or reposition for a gank without being seen.

abilities.name: Heartbreaker
abilities.howToUseIt: Teleport to a location near your target to execute them on arrival, knocking their allies away with the shockwave. Save this for isolated priority targets, since it can be a game-changing pick if it lands clean.

earlyGamePlan: As a jungler, clear efficiently with Blade of the Ruined King's percent-health damage, then look for early ganks using Spectral Maw's stun to set up kills. Once you get a takedown, always possess the resulting wraith to heal up and gain extra tools before continuing your gank or fight, since chaining kills is how Viego snowballs.
quickTips: Always possess a wraith after a kill to heal and gain temporary access to their abilities
Use Harrowed Path to scout brush and set up ambushes with camouflage
Don't dash in with Spectral Maw against an alert enemy who can dodge the wind-up
Save Heartbreaker for isolated, high-priority targets rather than into a grouped enemy team
Chain kills quickly since your power depends heavily on possessing bodies
Use Blade of the Ruined King's health-based damage to help against tanky enemies
whatToExpect: An enemy Viego will look to snowball off early kills, so deny him easy takedowns and be careful about dying near him since he can possess your body for a heal and your own abilities. Watch for a hidden wraith near brush from Harrowed Path, and try to stay grouped with allies so his Heartbreaker execute can't isolate and pick you off.

glossary.definition: The player who clears neutral monster camps in the jungle instead of laning, and ganks lanes to help teammates.
When a player, often the jungler, ambushes an enemy lane to help their ally get a kill or force enemies away.
Turning an early advantage into an even bigger one, growing stronger relative to the enemy over time.
A stealth-like state where a champion is hidden from enemies unless they have vision-revealing effects nearby.
Tall grass on the map that hides champions standing inside it from enemies outside.
A target who is alone, away from their teammates, and easier to safely engage or kill.
